note: Home regime: a broad, well-bid advance. Exposure multiplier peaks (1.1); deploy the most capital into the strongest momentum names whose realised vol sits in the healthy band. CAKE trends hard but at blow-off vol (132%) so its vol_quality collapses to 0 and it is rejected despite top momentum.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 71 >= 65 AND median_24h_return 3.4 > 2 AND fear_greed 72 >= 60 -> breakout (broad, well-bid advance)
computed.risk_budget_reason: (100 - target_stable_reserve 12) * 1.1 = 96.8, clamped to 100 - min_stable_reserve 10 = 90; five healthy-vol momentum names share it under the 17% cap, remainder is the USDT reserve.

blend_scores.components: aligned rising EMA stack + positive MACD hist; realised vol 78 inside healthy band 50-80 -> vol_quality 1.0
strong trend, realised vol 68 in healthy band -> vol_quality 1.0
aligned trend, realised vol 72 in healthy band -> vol_quality 1.0
large-cap trend leg, realised vol 61 in healthy band -> vol_quality 1.0
aligned trend, realised vol 64 in healthy band -> vol_quality 1.0
TOP momentum but realised vol 132 > ceiling 110 -> BLOW-OFF zone, vol_quality 0 -> blend_score 0 (exhaustion-prone, rejected)

computed.blend_reason: Five names combine strong, aligned momentum with realised vol inside the healthy 50-80 band, so vol_quality = 1.0 and blend_score clears 0.65. CAKE has the strongest raw momentum but its realised vol 132% sits in the blow-off zone; the multiplicative gate collapses its blend_score to 0 — a parabolic spike, not a tradable trend.

entry: Enter assets with blend_score >= 0.65, max 5, ordered by blend_score.
Require strong momentum (aligned rising EMA stack + positive MACD histogram) AND realised vol inside the healthy band (vol_quality > 0).
Reject blow-off-vol names (realised_vol > 110%) and dead-vol names (realised_vol < 40%) even with top momentum: the multiplicative gate zeroes vol_quality.
Per-name weight capped at 17%; route by blend_score share of the risk budget; surplus falls to the USDT reserve.
exit: Trim/exit when blend_score < min_score_to_hold 0.50 on the next rebalance.
Trim when realised vol pushes into the blow-off zone (vol_quality decaying) — the trend is turning exhaustion-prone.
Ride winners with an ATR(14) stop; exit on a close back below EMA26 or the stop; force-exit at stop_loss 12% or take_profit 40%; rotate to USDT on a risk_off transition.

blend_score 0.84; aligned trend, realised vol 72 healthy
blend_score 0.82; large-cap trend leg, realised vol 61 healthy
blend_score 0.78; aligned trend, realised vol 64 healthy
